design_philosophy.core_loop: Match three or more colored blocks in rows, clear them, cause chain reactions via gravity, manage steadily rising block stack
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Time pressure from continuously rising blocks toward top of playfield; escalating speed forces increasing execution pace
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Skillful block manipulation and chain-reaction mastery; satisfying cascade combos; competitive head-to-head puzzle dueling
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Puzzle game with action-puzzle hybrid DNA—emphasizes real-time execution and chain reactions over pure logic solving. Cursor-based matching differs fundamentally from Tetris piece rotation, establishing distinct identity. Multiple game mode variety signals design for broad audience engagement rather than singular mechanical focus.

difficulty.checkpointing: Story Mode progresses through opponent series; Endless Mode continuous until blocks reach top; Stage Clear and Puzzle modes have discrete objective-based progression
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Multiplayer modes feature adjustable difficulty levels; multiple game mode selection (Story, Endless, Timed, Stage Clear, Puzzle) allows self-selection of challenge type and intensity

progression.unlock_mechanism: Story Mode unlocks opponent roster progression; Stage Clear mode advances through preset stage sequence
replayability_hooks: Endless Mode offers indefinite playtime with escalating block rise speed
Puzzle Mode presents preset arrangements requiring solution in limited moves
Timed Mode challenges high-score maximization within two-minute window
Multiplayer modes with adjustable difficulty enable competitive replay
Chain reaction discovery and optimization encourages mechanical mastery

world_building_techniques: Character roster differentiation (original Japanese: fairies with fantasy setting; international: Yoshi's Island characters)
Background artwork changes as player progresses through stages (referenced: Lakitu and Windy backgrounds)
Character selection in Story Mode establishes implied narrative pairings and rivalries

faction_indicators: Story Mode opponent roster creates implicit competitive hierarchy
Character selection (fairy or Yoshi variant) signals region/cultural identity
environmental_storytelling: Background progression through Story Mode stages suggests narrative geography
Character-specific backgrounds in Endless Mode tie playable entities to world spaces
